#  Budget And Forecast Snapshots User Guide 
Table of Contents 
##  Configure Columns 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Budget** tool. 
  2. Click the **Project Status Snapshots** tab.
  3. Click **Configure Columns**.  
This opens the**Table Settings** panel. 
![Pss Configure Columns](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1cd7f209e8b4d1b4d2cc2ee27af78ed1/f78fd261b6f5f4c63465a4cdda7078be/pss-configure-columns.png?fm=webp)
  4. Under **Configure Columns** , you have these choices for each available column:
     * Click **Show** columns. Move the toggle switch to the right. The system's default setting is to show all available columns. 
     * **Hide** columns. Move the toggle switch to the left. 
  5. When finished, click the **Close**(x) icon on the panel.
